1.content:
Mia followed her friend Nicole into the living room. School had just let out for the summer, and the two were so relieved. "Oh my god I thought 4th period would never end," Nicole said as she walked over to the couch. Mia followed behind her silently.

Mia's boyfriend, Derek had broken up with her today, and she was crushed. Mia sat down on the couch next to her friend and stared at her lap. "Hey cheer up Mia, there's zillions of other people out there," her friend put an arm around her and gave her a quick hug, Mia's chin grazed the tit flesh of her best friend, "That Derek loser didn't know what he had anyways."

Mia smiled a little bit, maybe Nicole was right. Just then the front door opened and in walked Nicole's little sister: Taylor. She threw her shoes off and sighed with relief, "Ah fuck it feels good to be outta that hell-hole," she exlaimed. She walked past the couch, she shook her ass a lil as she passed Mia. She stopped at the doorway to the Kitchen and turned, "Hey Mia," she said with a smile, "You want anything?"

"No thank you," Mia answered weakly.

Taylor shrugged and walked into the kitchen, "How come you didn't offer me anything?" Nicole yelled after her little sister.

"You live here," she replied back.

Nicole sighed, "I'll be right back Mia, you sure you don't want anything?" she asked, Mia nodded, "Ok then you better be happy when I come back young lady or else," she teased.

Mia smiled weakly as she watched her friend walk off. Why couldn't she have breasts like Nicole or an ass like Taylor? Maybe then she could keep a boyfriend. She suddenly felt a sharp pain in her stomache, she bent over and clenched her stomache. She tried to scream but nothing came out. She slammed her eyes shut and shook out of pain and fear.

When she opened her eyes she was amazed to find that she was....

12333212.content:
“Umm, let’s not do that Katie at least not yet,” Mia told the giant girl.

“Why not?” Katie inquired.

Mia paused to think about her reasoning before responding, “I just,” she stammered, “I need a little time to relax and once Nicole finds out about this, she’s going to want to get me back to normal and I don’t need doctors poking me right now.”

“I don’t like doctors either,” Katie sympathized.

Suddenly the door opened, and Nicole came in, “Katie, are you okay? You never answered me.”

Thinking fast Mia ran behind Katie who was searching for a good lie, “I umm… saw a spider.” Katie replied not looking her sister in the eyes.

“You did?” Nicole skeptically questioned.

Katie cleared her throat and continued to concentrate on her pillow, “I was getting my jammies for my bath and he crawled out from under the bed.”

“Well,” Nicole said slowly, “you want me to find him?”

“No,” Katie quickly replied, “he ran away.”

“Okay,” Nicole went to the door, “I’m going to get your bath ready.”

After Nicole left Mia came out and Katie gave her a guilty look, “I don’t like lying to Nicky.”

“I know Katie,” Mia soothed, “but it’s just for a little while.” Mia put a hand on Katie’s knee, “I just want a little quality time with my favorite Munchkin.”

“I’m your favorite?” Katie started, “Hey wait a minute I’m not a munchkin you’re the one in my Barbie’s dress.”

“Yeah,” Mia countered, “but I’m not the one with cartoon characters on my panties.”

Katie laughed. “Katie,” Nicole called, “bath time!”

“Coming!” Katie shouted back. “Wanna come take a bath with me?” Mia gave Katie an apprehensive look, “you can wear a swimsuit,” Katie offered.

Mia thought for a moment…
12333212.title: Secret Vacation

123332121.content:
“I guess a swim could be relaxing.” Mia decided.

Katie gave a squeal of joy and ran to her toy chest, she kept digging before a call came. “Katie bathtime!”

“One minute!” Katie fired back as she kept digging before pulling out a Barbie doll wearing a red bikini. “Lifeguard Barbie,” Katie announced as she ran the doll back to the bed, “you can wear her swimsuit.”

“Okay,” Mia agreed as she took the bathing suit off the doll. “Sorry Barbie, but I need this more,” Mia told the toy-making Katie giggle. Mia looked down at the swimsuit and at Katie who was staring down at the shrunken teen eagerly. “Katie,” Mia told the giant girl, “could I get a little privacy?”

“I dressed you up like a hundred times today,” Katie pointed out.

“Yeah, but that’s when you thought I was a doll. Now that you know I’m your friend could you give me a little privacy?” Mia responded.

Katie looked like she still didn’t understand but sighed and picked Mia up, “you can get dressed in my dollhouse. You’re a cranky dolly.”

Mia could only hope Katie was joking as the eight-year-old lowered her into the Barbie’s Dreamhouse and closed the walls. “Katie!” Nicole called up again.

“In a minute I’m looking for my favorite jammies!” Katie called back.

Mia hurried and found a room with no windows. As she dressed Mia looked around the room and could not help but smile. There was a Chelsea doll lying on the couch wearing a tutu and looking like she had been dancing before she was put down, a quarter was on the floor looking like a strange throw rug, and there was a small amount of dust on almost everything that (judging from the smell) were the remains of candy.

“Come to think of it,” Mia said to herself, “Nicole and I gave Katie that Barbie when she passed her swimming test,” Mia remembered how happy Katie had been that day and how proud she was that she could swim without floaties. Mia pulled the swimsuit over her body (it was loose in the chest area) and walked out of the dollhouse door. “Ready for the pool.”

“You look pretty,” Katie complimented as she put her hand down and Mia climbed on while Katie carried her pajamas in her other arm.

“Katie!” Nicole shouted, “I am going to count to ten and if you are not in this bathroom when I reach ten, I am going to come into your room, grab you, take you to the tub, and drop you into these waters clothes and all!”

Katie ran across the house as Nicole counted out loud. I was quite the ride for Mia, but she held on tight to Katie’s hand. As the pair reached the bathroom door Mia cried out, “Hide me in the pajamas.”

Katie quickly did so and ran inside the bathroom, “Nine,” Nicole counted, “there you are.”

“Sorry Nicky,” Katie responded as she set her pajamas down.

Mia heard Nicole kiss her little sister, “just come when I tell you to Katie, you know better.” Nicole lightly scolded, “do you need any help?”

“I’m okay,” Katie told her sister, “I’m a big girl now.”

Mia heard Nicole chuckle, “okay big girl, your towel is by the sink, shout if you need me, and don’t forget to pull the drain out when you’re done.” Nicole closed the door and Mia peaked out of her hiding space but quickly retreated when her friend returned. “Oh,” Nicole added, “and make sure you lock the door behind me, apparently Taylor and her friends went to a Mexican place to celebrate the end of the school year and I think we both know what that means.”

“The potty’s gonna throw up again?” Katie suggested.

Nicole laughed, “only if she uses too much toilet paper again, although if I were the toilet and I had to deal with Taylor.”

“I heard that!” Taylor called.

Once more the door closed, and this time Mia heard the click of the door lock and came out of her hiding place and saw Katie reaching for her shirt before she noticed Mia. “Hey,” Katie said embarrassed, “don’t look.”

Mia smiled, “Katie, I used to help your sister change your diaper.”

“That was when I was a baby,” Katie responded, “now we’re friends and I’m asking for a little privacy.”

“Touché,” Mia responded as she went back into her hiding place.

“What?” Katie inquired confused.

Mia chuckled as she hid her face.

“You won’t look?” Katie questioned.

“Not until you say so,” Mia told her giant friend, “I promise.”

Several moments passed until Mia heard a light splash, “okay,” Katie told the shrunken teen, “you can look now.” Mia looked and saw Katie with only her head poking out of the bubbles and Mia smiled. Katie reached out her arm for her tiny friend, “ready to swim?” the child inquired.

Mia happily jumped onto her giant friend’s hand, “ready to swim,” the teen responded as the girl slowly lowered her into the water.
123332121.title: Getting ready for a bath

1233321211.content:
Now Mia knew what if felt like to swim in a giant hot tub although she was probably the first person in history to do so with a giant eight-year-old, the only real problem was to remember to try to keep your eyes closed in the suds although several times she got amazing views from inside bubbles. Katie made sure Mia was respecting her privacy by covering her privates with a washcloth but the two still found ways to amuse themselves such as talking or playing one of Katie’s games.

“The hungry shark,” Katie narrates as she hides in what remained of the bubbles, “stakes her prey,”

“Stalks!” Mia corrected as she rode on top of Katie’s rubber duck.

“Stalks her prey,” Katie stated, “hungry for food, she spots a helpless sailor girl.” Katie slowly approached her delighted ‘prey’ under the water with her hand sticking out like a fin. Mia played along; she hummed a nameless tune as she pretends not to see or hear the giant girl approaching her and when the ‘shark’ emerged from the water (knocking the teenager off her ducky transport) with an adorable roar Mia let out as convincing a scream as she could give (though a few laughs escaped as well). Katie the shark reached down and put Mia’s leg in her mouth (she covered her teeth with her lips so all the teenage girl had to worry about was drool and pinching sensation) before the teen fell back into the water.

“That was fun,” Mia announced as she rubbed her leg, “a little painful but fun.”

“I didn’t hurt you, did I?” Katie guiltily inquired.

“I’m fine,” Mia assured her.

“Well, just in case,” Katie told the teen as she gently lifted her out of the water, “I’ll make it all better.” Katie lifted her legs to where her feet were sticking out of the tub in imitation of a tailfin. “Because I’m Princess of the Mermaids and my kisses have get better powers.” The child kissed Mia’s leg and put her back in the water.

“I think it worked.” Mia announced as she gave a curtsey in the water, “thank you, princess.”

Katie yawned, “you’re welcome.”

Mia giggled, “I think it’s time for bed.”

“No,” Katie argued, “I wanna play more.”

“Come on Katie,” Mia shot back, “we’ve played shark, bubble hide and seek, we made a snowman out of the bubbles, I told you about the time your sister and I were in ballet together, and I even did those dance moves for you. The water’s getting cold and the bubbles are almost gone.” Mia could tell that her giant friend still was not convinced (of course how many girls got a chance to play with a real doll-sized girl) so she gave a fake yawn (though she was truthfully tired) “I think I’m ready for bed.”

Katie smiled, “okay, bedtime for Mia,” she put her hand under the teenager, “don’t look until I say so.”

Mia closed her eyes, “I promise.”

Katie lifted the shrunken girl out of the water and Mia felt herself being placed on the counter and heard the drain being pulled out of the tub and the water draining away and a few moments later Katie spoke, “okay you can look.” Mia opened her eyes and saw Katie was wearing a pink nightgown.

“You look really pretty Katie,” Mia complimented, “now it’s your turn to close your eyes.”

“How come?” Katie inquired.

Mia blushed, “I have to go to the bathroom, and I thought I could use the sink since I’m too small for the toilet.”

Katie giggled but complied, and though she kept her eyes closed as Mia did her business and even suggested she use a tissue for the paper that did not stop her from teasing her shrunken friend, “you can wear my doll’s diapers for next time!” All Mia could do was salvage her pride as she finished up and put the swimsuit back on.

“I’m done,” Mia called.

Katie moved over and rinsed the sink out while she brushed her teeth, “now let’s find you something to wear to bed,” Katie announced as she and Mia took off for her room. After getting out of her wet swimsuit Mia changed into a pink nightgown at Katie’s insistence who thought it was so adorable the two of them matched as they laid in her bed. Katie pulled out a storybook from her bookshelf and Chelsea’s training potty from the dollhouse, “you can use this to go potty and I can clean it out.” Finally, Katie laid down and Mia watched and listened as the little girl read Tangled to her (it was cool looking at the giant pictures though), they were not even halfway through the story when Katie fell asleep.

“And so, Flynn Ryder,” Katie read struggling to keep her eyes open, “took Rapunzel to the Snuggly Duckling where they found…” but before she could finish the sentence, she fell asleep with the book falling onto her stomach.

Mia chuckled and climbed up Katie’s pillow and kissed her on the forehead, “good night princess,” she said before making herself comfortable and laying down for sleep.

info.brief_description: A woman shrinks, and she's in her friend's house.
info.description:
Mia Fowelly was visting her friend Nicole when she suddenly shrinks on the couch. Now she's stuck in this house under the care of her close friend Nicole and her sister and her mother.

Characters:

Mia - Oriental girl, she's 18, with a bellow average breasts, but a round ass. She's shy and has only had one boyfriend.

Nicole - Mia's oldest and best friend, also 18. She has above average breasts, and get's alot of attention. She is very maternal and loves children. She wants to be a nanny or something to do with little kids when she grows up.

Taylor - Nicole's little sister, 16. She's a tomboy through and through, she loves to fart and burp and curse. She has average breasts, and a huge ass. She's secretly bi-sexual and has a crush on Mia. She also has a real dominering personality, covering a slightly maternal side.

Katie - Nicole's youngest sister, 8. She loves to play with dolls. She's a typical 8 year old girly girl.

Susan - Nicole's mom 38. She's a bit plump, but not quite fat. She has a huge ass and huge breasts. She's usually a very nice woman, but she's starved for sex.

Rules:

1) No sexual interaction between people under 16.

2) You can add characters from any age, but have Mia start out with one of the main characters.

3)No forced endings or never ending choices.

4) Mia's maximum height is 2 1/2 feet, and minimum is 8 inches.

have fun.
